output.code:
# Load the text file
path = "/mnt/data/file-7bzuW852a1c7vQ2uQnq7aP-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    text = f.read()
len(text), text[:3000]

# Find positions of double quotes
positions = [i for i, ch in enumerate(text) if ch == '"']
positions, len(positions)

subs = [
    text[positions[0]+1:positions[1]],
    text[positions[2]+1:positions[3]],
    text[positions[4]+1:]
]
subs[0], subs[1], subs[2][:200], len(subs[2])

import json, textwrap

spans = [
    {"span_start": positions[0]+1, "span_end": positions[1], "span_text": text[positions[0]+1:positions[1]], "citation_type":"Aya"},
    {"span_start": positions[2]+1, "span_end": positions[3], "span_text": text[positions[2]+1:positions[3]], "citation_type":"Aya"},
    {"span_start": positions[4]+1, "span_end": len(text), "span_text": text[positions[4]+1:], "citation_type":"Hadeeth"},
]
json_str = json.dumps({"citations": spans}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)
json_str[:1000], len(json_str)

# Print the hadith substring fully to paste
hadith_text = text[positions[4]+1:]
len(hadith_text)
